english: Strike Opponent's Ears with Both Fists
visual: Bow stance with both fists swinging in wide upward arcs to meet at head height, as if striking an opponent's temples.
motion_description: Starting from a rear-weighted stance with the left foot extended forward, the practitioner shifts weight onto the bending left leg to form a front lunge. Concurrently, the torso rotates to square forward as both arms sweep outward and upward in wide, symmetrical arcs from the hips. The hands close into fists as they converge at head height directly in front of the face, concluding the fluid, continuous motion with a deliberate pause.
